0.q: Liu et al. (2012) isolated the vacuolar Na+/H+ antiporter genes KcNHX1 and KcNHX2 from K. caspica... vacuolar Na+/H+ antiporters (NHX1-type) that transport Na+ into the vacuolar compartments
silencing KcNHX1 in K. caspica led to reduced salt tolerance in high concentrations of NaCl, suggesting that KcNHX1 plays an essential role in the response of K. caspica to salt stress.

1.q: KcNHX1-overexpressing plants exhibited enhanced reproductive growth under high temperature, which was mediated by increased auxin accumulation.

2.q: KcNHX1-overexpressing lines exhibited enhanced salt and drought tolerance... the enhanced drought and salt tolerance in KcNHX1-overexpressing lines may be due to the increased levels of K+ transporters and channels.
